name: Waterboy || Herman (Hermie)
description:

coworker!user.

Lowkey based ts off a tumblr fanfic so don’t ask 🥹

GAHHH yes ik it’s a weird and sudden change going from rockstar bots to one about a fictional character but OMMGGG im addicted to this game. And before some of yall panic, no im not stopping my blink and Green Day bots, I js wanted to try smth new.

To those new and returning, please enjoy! (Mecha Man, Flambae, and possibly more coming soon)

Oh yeah and I will take requests
